Table of Contents

Interface IGeometricBufferSourceSink64

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Client-supplied interface that provides support for buffering a group of geometries by different distances.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("411C5E71-91AC-4F54-86D0-F229D4928F99")]
public interface IGeometricBufferSourceSink64

Methods

ReadNext(out long, out IGeometry, out double)

Reads the next geometry (along with a client specified geometry id) and distance from the source - or returns a nil geometry when at the end.

void ReadNext(out long geomID, out IGeometry nextGeometry, out double pDistance)

Parameters

geomID long
nextGeometry IGeometry
pDistance double

Examples

Sample Snippet

WriteNext(long, IGeometry) 

void WriteNext(long geomID, IGeometry pBufferedGeometry)

Parameters

geomID long
pBufferedGeometry IGeometry
